title: Big Technology AI Summit (full): Greg Brockman, Mike Krieger, Aaron Levie & Friends of The Podcast
summary: The Big Technology AI Summit on June 18, 2026 convened leaders from OpenAI, Anthropic, Box, Meta, and enterprise firms to discuss the federal forced recall of Anthropic's Fable and Mythos models. Topics included whether the recall resembles an AI pause, AI infrastructure buildout priorities, enterprise ROI versus token maximization, and geopolitical implications for US-China AI competition.
